name: Western Gold Exploration Limited
summary: Western Gold Exploration Limited explores for and develops mineral properties. It primarily explores for gold and copper deposits. The company holds interest in the Knapdale project that prospective for orogenic quartz-gold-silver lodes comprising three contiguous sub-properties, including Stronchulin, Ormsary North, and Ormsary South properties located to the west of the city of Glasgow and to the south of the town of Oban in the uplands of the west coast of Scotland. It also holds interest in the Lagalochan copper-gold porphyry project located in East Kames, Kilmelford, Scotland. Western Gold Exploration Limited is headquartered in North Berwick, the United Kingdom.
